body.title: Deepen Igor's memory scaffold: occurrence signals, recursive traversal, task boundaries, grader decomposition
body.text:
# D-igor-memory-depth-2026-05-10
**title:** Deepen Igor's memory scaffold: occurrence signals, recursive traversal, task boundaries, grader decomposition
**date:** 2026-05-10
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-igor-proposals-occurrence-signal, T-igor-recursive-edge-traversal, T-igor-ne-task-boundary, T-igor-ne-grader-decompose

## Decision narrative
Four scaffold-deepening improvements derived from neuroscience/ML reading synthesis: (1) occurrence_count on proposals gives Igor the recurrence signal needed to judge promotion — the calligraphy principle: promotion requires recurrence AND foreseen future use, both judgment calls, never auto-gates; (2) WITH RECURSIVE CTE replaces Python-level propagation in activate() — DB-native, cleaner, cycle-safe; (3) NE task boundary flushes episodic context on focus displacement — task = fresh window, step = accumulates (AgentSPEX pattern applied to NE); (4) grader decomposition makes quality signals actionable — low memory_retrieval signals Librarian curation, low context_assembly triggers task boundary, low coherence feeds watch-confidence accumulator.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
